style_effects: Gentle water droplets cling to Venusaur's leafy skin, each reflecting soft blue light as they slowly drift upward. A serene aura of cool cerulean radiates from its pores, forming a subtle, shimmering ripple effect around its body. The lighting mood is calm and refreshing, with a gentle glow of pale aquamarine illuminating the surrounding misty atmosphere. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
